anomalies.message: Solution had C₁/λ₁ repeated (should be C₂/λ₂); fixed by mathematical context (sum of Cᵢ/λᵢ for each term)
anomalies.evidence: The integral ∫₀^∞ y(x)dx = -(C₁/λ₁ + C₂/λ₂) follows from ∫ e^{λx}dx = -e^{λx}/λ. The result 3/k confirms the correction.

resolvedAnomalies.resolution: Options (A)(B)(C)(D) extracted from paper Markdown stem via deterministic parsing.
Option (D) text was merged with option (C) in the stem; separated by deterministic boundary match against paper Markdown.
